subject: [PATCH 06/24] nfsd: allow nfsd to get a dir lease with an ignore mask

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch allows the NFS daemon to obtain a directory lease with an ignore mask, enabling it to filter out specific notification types such as file creation, deletion, and renaming. The ignore mask is determined by the requested notification types, allowing for more fine-grained control over which events trigger notifications. This change affects the nfsd component of the Linux kernel.
